title: Easier Armor Trim Duplication
description: A mod that makes duplicating smithing templates easier
body:
This mod adds a single item Blank Smithing Template, This item is used to duplicate Smithing Templates.
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/WgfjOk8.png)
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/CQCEquE.png)
